TRNSPRTN_NON_MDCL_CD TRNSPRTN_NON_MDCL_CD A1250B Transportation: Yes, non-medical CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident's lack of transportation has kept them from non-medical meetings, appointments, work, or from getting things that they need. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
discontinued 9/30/2025
